examples: The vitro estrogenic activities of 11 protopanaxadiol type saponins were tested by a recombinant yeast.
Soy isoflavones are known to be estrogenic.
An acceleration of bone loss begins along with estrogenic deficiency after menopause.
The pancreatic beta cells have estrogen RECEPTORS. Estrogenic receptors trigger insulin release which is why they tell women on oral contraceptives to watch out for strokes and heart problems.
Tamoxifen's estrogenic effect does have its benefits.
